title: bus.dispatch.recycle.completed v1
description: A task that was recycled (re-dispatched after failure/retry) has completed its re-execution. Emitted by hearth-loom's recycle dispatch loop when a recycled execution finishes with a terminal disposition. Source: /hearth-loom.

execution_id.description: UUID of the (recycled) execution that completed

project_path.description: Absolute path to the project directory

consecutive_recycles.description: Number of consecutive recycle attempts that led to this execution

disposition.description: Terminal outcome of the recycled execution
